message:
feat(fwc): wire config revisions, diff, and rollback subcommands

Adds three new `fwc config` subcommands backed by host admin RPCs:
- `config revisions <connector>` — lists config revision history
- `config diff <connector> --file <path>` — shows diff between candidate
  and current config
- `config rollback <connector> <revision>` — rolls back to a prior revision

Also fixes template.rs non-exhaustive slice patterns for Rust 2024 edition
and updates readiness classification counts.

10 new tests, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
